mapper.select: WITH LatestReports AS ( SELECT TARGET_MEMBER_ID, REASON, RESULT_STATUS, CREATED_AT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TARGET_MEMBER_ID ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC) as rn FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY ), ReportStats AS ( SELECT TARGET_MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) AS REPORT_COUNT, MAX(CREATED_AT) AS LATEST_REPORT_DATE FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY GROUP BY TARGET_MEMBER_ID ) SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, m.NICKNAME, m.EMAIL, m.ROLE, m.STATUS, m.SOCIAL_PROVIDER AS provider, TO_CHAR(m.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS joined_at, TO_CHAR(m.LAST_LOGIN, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS last_login, -- 진짜 최근접속일 연결 NVL(s.REPORT_COUNT, 0) AS reports, r.REASON AS report_reason, TO_CHAR(s.LATEST_REPORT_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS last_report_date, NVL(r.RESULT_STATUS, '없음') AS result_status, TO_CHAR(m.SUSPENSION_END_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS suspension_end_date -- 회원 테이블의 정지 기한 연결 FROM MEMBER m LEFT JOIN ReportStats s ON m.MEMBER_ID = s.TARGET_MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN LatestReports r ON m.MEMBER_ID = r.TARGET_MEMBER_ID AND r.rn = 1 ORDER BY m.CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET STATUS = 'SUSPENDED', SUSPENSION_END_DATE = SYSDATE + #{days}, PROCESSING_RESULT = #{days} || '일 정지 처분' WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{id}
UPDATE MEMBER SET STATUS = 'BLACKLISTED', SUSPENSION_END_DATE = TO_DATE('9999-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), PROCESSING_RESULT = '영구 정지 처분' WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{id}
UPDATE MEMBER SET STATUS = 'ACTIVE', SUSPENSION_END_DATE = NULL, PROCESSING_RESULT = '제재 해제 복원' WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{id}
